---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. How would you use it?

```python
# Example usage (if applicable)
from blog_ai import BlogGenerator

# Your proposed API or workflow
generator = BlogGenerator()
result = generator.some_new_feature()
```

## Benefits

What are the benefits of implementing this feature?

- Improved performance
- Better user experience
- New capabilities
- etc.

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here.

## Related Features

Are there any related features or issues? Link them here.

- Related to #123
- Builds on #456

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case for this feature
- [ ] I have considered alternatives

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, diagrams, or screenshots about the feature request here.
